payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it represents the newer current memory for Sam from Goldman, and mem_old was filtered out because it had been superseded.
citations: input: "Explain why recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman and filtered mem_old because it is superseded."
payload.decision: Recall selected mem_new as the current memory and excluded mem_old because mem_old was identified as superseded by a newer, more specific memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall result indicates the newer memory for Sam at Goldman should be preferred, while the older memory is no longer current.

payload.intent: Explain the recall result for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered out as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: For Sam from Goldman, mem_new is the active memory returned by recall.
mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and should not be treated as current.

details: Explained filtering of mem_old as superseded.

repair_options: Keep mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman.
Retain mem_old only as historical context, not as current state.

raw_text: {"intent":"Explain the recall result for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered out as superseded.","decision":"Recall selected mem_new as the current memory and excluded mem_old because mem_old was identified as superseded by a newer, more specific memory.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current_state","statement":"For Sam from Goldman, mem_new is the active memory returned by recall.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"associated_with","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"mem_new","predicate":"supersedes","object":"mem_old"}]},{"kind":"superseded","statement":"mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and should not be treated as current.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"mem_old","type":"memory","role":"superseded record"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolve_to_current_memory","entity_id":null,"reason":"The recall result indicates the newer memory for Sam at Goldman should be preferred, while the older memory is no longer current."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it represents the newer current memory for Sam from Goldman, and mem_old was filtered out because it had been superseded.","citations":["input: \"Explain why recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman and filtered mem_old because it is superseded.\""],"repair_options":["Keep mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman.","Retain mem_old only as historical context, not as current state."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained selection of mem_new.","Explained filtering of mem_old as superseded."]}}
